title: Inf-A
treatment_protocol_ch1: Cells were treated with VITD 4 hours after infection. THP-1 cells were washed with PBS at 24h and  collected  for analysis
growth_protocol_ch1: Cells cultured in 24-well flat bottom plates 5 X 105 cells per well were pre-treated with 20ng/ml PMA for 24 h, and incubated with M. tuberculosis H37Rv.After 4 hours of infection, the medium was removed, cells were washed  to remove extracellular bacteria, and fresh medium was added
extract_protocol_ch1: Trizol extraction of total RNA was performed according to the manufacturer's instructions.
label_protocol_ch1: The Ambion WT Expression Kit with accompanying protocol was used to label the samples
hyb_protocol: The Affymetrix Genechip WT Terminal Labeling and Hybridization protocol was used
scan_protocol: Chips were scanned using the Affymetrix 7G Plus scanner and Command Console Software
description: THP-1 cells were cultured in 24-well flat bottom plates, pre-treated with 20ng/ml PMA for 24 h
data_processing: Probeset expression was summarized with the RMA method using APT 1.15.0 software.  Command options included -a rma-bg,quant-norm.sketch=0.usepm=true.bioc=true,pm-only,med-polish.expon=true and --qc-probesets.
